rationale: Multiple instances of 'createdump.exe' are executed by PowerShell processes (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003, EV-004) to dump the 'lsass.dmp' file. This activity is indicative of credential dumping, a common post-exploitation technique. The repeated attempts and the target file 'dotnet-lsass.dmp' strongly suggest malicious intent.
